title: oryza elongata
intro: Oryza elongata, also known as wild rice, is a type of aquatic plant native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its seeds and roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Oryza elongata include its ability to act as a diuretic, lower blood pressure, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Oryza elongata can be found in traditional medicine, often in the form of teas, infusions, or decoctions made from its seeds, roots, or leaves.
